title: aster viscidulus
intro: Aster viscidulus, also known as sticky aster, is a plant species in the daisy family, characterized by its sticky leaves and yellow or purple flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds and infections. The health benefits of Aster viscidulus include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and exhibit antimicrobial activity, making it a potential natural remedy for various health conditions. The herbal preparation of Aster viscidulus can be made into a tea, tincture, or salve, and is often used topically to treat skin conditions and wounds.
